label.title: Jahia Cloud — Threads & Heap Dumps Provider
label.description: Provides read-only JCR access to thread dumps and heap dumps generated on Jahia Cloud (stored at /var/tmp/cloud).
label.dumpPathHint: Hardcoded filesystem path where Jahia Cloud stores thread and heap dumps.
label.mountPathHint: JCR path under which dump files are accessible. Changes take effect immediately.
label.saveError: An error occurred while saving settings.
